Materials

Premium Fabric Options

Choose from 8 fabric types with GSM options from 160 to 400.

🧶

100% Cotton

Soft & breathable. Natural comfort. Ideal for everyday wear.

🧵

French Terry

Soft looped inside. Absorbent & breathable. Perfect for hoodies.

🔥

Fleece

Warm & cozy. Soft brushed inside. Ideal for winter wear.

💧

Polyester

Lightweight & durable. Moisture wicking. Quick dry fabric.

🌬️

Mesh Fabric

Breathable & airy. Perfect for sportswear. Lightweight comfort.

↔️

Spandex Blend

4-way stretch. Flexible & comfortable. Perfect fit & movement.

🛡️

Nylon

Water resistant. Lightweight. Wind protection.

📏

GSM Options

160 | 220 | 240 | 280 | 300 | 320 | 350 | 400 GSM
